name: lindo-ai
description: Create websites, pages, and blog posts with AI. Manage clients, credits, and domains — all through conversation.

interface.longDescription: Create websites, pages, and blog posts with AI. Manage clients, assign websites, generate magic login links, and allocate credits. Built for agencies managing multiple client websites.
defaultPrompt: Create a modern website for a coffee shop called Bean & Brew
Show me all my websites and their status
Write a blog post about web design trends for my client's site
